nodes.body:
# Integration Stack — Context

## What This Is

n8n + Asana + Notion integration layer for BOTH Ventures.

- **n8n**: Automation backbone — routes action items to Asana, syncs vault to Notion, runs cron workflows
- **Asana**: Task approval gate — Daiana reviews and approves action items extracted by /mine
- **Notion**: Presentation layer — read-only view of vault state for team + external stakeholders

**Architecture principle:** Vault writes first. Notion reflects. Asana gates. n8n connects.

---

## Flow Diagrams

### Action Item Flow (post-meeting)
```
Tuesday meeting → Daiana captures notes
  → /mine {notes}                          # extracts + archives
  → vault/pending/YYYY-MM-DD-{slug}.md     # awaits champion review
  → champions set approved: true
  → /mine approve vault/pending/{file}.md  # writes to vault
  → python3 scripts/asana-push.py {file}  # ← automatic after /mine approve
  → dedup check (queries Asana, skips existing tasks)
  → n8n webhook (action-items-to-asana)
  → Asana: task created, assigned, sectioned
  → Supabase: pending_actions row inserted
  → Daiana marks complete in Asana
```

### Vault → Notion Sync Flow
```
Monday: champions run /vu /au (vault updated)
  → python3 scripts/vault-to-notion.py --all   # Mariano runs manually
  OR
  → n8n cron (Mon+Thu 9 AM) fetches from GitHub → pushes to Notion
  → Notion Ventures Database updated
  → Notion Strategy Hub pages updated
```

---

## Environment Variables

All credentials live in `.env` at repo root (not committed to Git).

### Already set (from existing infra)
```
SUPABASE_URL=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY=
OPENAI_API_KEY=
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=
```

### To add — Asana
```
BOTH_ASANA_TOKEN=          # Daiana's Asana personal access token
                           # From: Asana → Profile → Developer Console → New Token
```

### To add — n8n
```
N8N_WEBHOOK_ASANA=         # From n8n after importing action-items-to-asana workflow
                           # Format: https://your-instance.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/both-action-items
N8N_WEBHOOK_VAULT_SYNC=    # From n8n after importing vault-to-notion workflow (optional)
```

# LC Paperclip — Deployment Context

BOTH-branded fork of Paperclip AI. Runs locally on Mariano's machine via Docker Compose + Cloudflare Quick Tunnel. Serves as the shared agent interface for the team.

## Deployment Location

```
/Users/boris/Documents/COMANDO/BOTH/LaChamana_AI-WORKSPACE/deploy/
```

This is a separate repo/workspace from `BOTH_AI`. Do not confuse the two.

## Start / Stop

```bash
# Start (prints public URL at the end)
cd /Users/boris/Documents/COMANDO/BOTH/LaChamana_AI-WORKSPACE/deploy
docker compose --env-file .env up -d && sleep 5 && docker compose logs tunnel 2>&1 | grep "trycloudflare.com"

# Stop (data preserved — next start resumes from same state)
docker compose down

# Status check
docker compose -f /Users/boris/Documents/COMANDO/BOTH/LaChamana_AI-WORKSPACE/deploy/docker-compose.yml ps
```

**Shell aliases (set in `~/.zshrc`):**
```bash
alias paperclip-start="cd /Users/boris/Documents/COMANDO/BOTH/LaChamana_AI-WORKSPACE/deploy && docker compose --env-file .env up -d && sleep 5 && docker compose logs tunnel 2>&1 | grep trycloudflare"
alias paperclip-stop="cd /Users/boris/Documents/COMANDO/BOTH/LaChamana_AI-WORKSPACE/deploy && docker compose down"
```

## Cloudflare Tunnel — Known Issue

Paperclip uses a Cloudflare **Quick Tunnel** (`*.trycloudflare.com`). The URL changes every time the tunnel restarts and must be whitelisted in Paperclip:

```bash
# After restart, get the new URL from logs, then:
docker exec deploy-server-1 pnpm paperclipai allowed-hostname <new-url>.trycloudflare.com
docker compose restart server
```

**Fix pending:** Set up a named Cloudflare tunnel for a permanent URL. Not yet configured.

## Agent Sync

Agent instructions (`.claude/agents/*.md`) are synced to Paperclip via:

```bash
# From BOTH_AI repo root:
PAPERCLIP_URL=<url> PAPERCLIP_API_KEY=<key> PAPERCLIP_COMPANY_ID=<id> \
  .claude/scripts/sync-paperclip-agents.sh

# Dry run preview:
.claude/scripts/sync-paperclip-agents.sh --dry-run

# Single agent:
.claude/scripts/sync-paperclip-agents.sh --agent meeting-miner
```

Env vars needed: `PAPERCLIP_URL`, `PAPERCLIP_API_KEY`, `PAPERCLIP_COMPANY_ID`.

# Synergy — Context

> **Canonical doctrine se mudó a [`vault/soul.md`](../../vault/soul.md) — L0 del Atlas (2026-06-01).** Este archivo queda como pre-read histórico de la reunión 2026-05-20 (W21).

Project-level home de Synergy. Acá vive la doctrina, el estado y los pre-reads. Discutido en la reunión de equipo del miércoles 2026-05-20 (W21).

## Definición

Synergy es el patrón de acoplamiento entre humanos, agentes y vault. Es la inteligencia distribuida que emerge cuando los tres operan como una sola pieza coordinada.

- **Humanos** — el equipo que decide, valida, contextualiza.
- **Agentes** — la inteligencia ejecutiva: Claude + agents + automations + Cloudflare Worker.
- **Vault** — la memoria institucional estructurada.

La triple dependencia es el punto. Humanos sin vault olvidan. Agentes sin vault son genéricos. Vault sin humanos y agentes es archivo muerto.

**Synergy ≠ B_V® | OS.** B_V® | OS es la infraestructura técnica (Supabase, Worker, repo, integraciones). Synergy es lo que pasa cuando esa infraestructura se acopla con el equipo a través del vault.

## Frame propuesto — Agentic Venture Platform

Rene propuso un upgrade de marco que estamos trabajando como hipótesis activa, no como decisión cerrada:

- Both no es venture platform que opera en complejidad. Es **Agentic Venture Platform** — institución cuya naturaleza es ser inteligencia operativa que construye, acelera e interconecta deep-tech ventures.
- La arquitectura **es** la tesis. Synergy no es tooling auxiliar; es la forma institucional de la doctrina.
- Inteligencia (humana + artificial) en el core, no encima de la estructura.
- No es claim de productividad. Es estructural — company-as-intelligence vs company-que-usa-intelligence.

Status: under-discussion (ver `vault/decisions/2026-05-14-synergy-frame-avp-propuesta-rene.md`).

## Las tres lecturas

Synergy se sostiene si las tres cierran a la vez. Si una no cierra, el resto se cae.

- **Tesis institucional** — qué tipo de cosa es Both.
- **Entidad operativa** — cómo opera el sistema.
- **Software** — qué archivos, qué agentes, qué pipeline.

# WhatsApp Integration — Architecture & Setup

**Status:** Phase 1 pending (Railway deploy) · Worker V2.5 live · MCP ready to install  
**Owner:** Mariano  
**Activated:** 2026-05-12

---

## Architecture

```
WhatsApp Groups (team comms)
    └── evolution-api V2 (Railway)
            ├── Webhook → POST /whatsapp → Cloudflare Worker V2.5
            │       └── /mine command → fetches 100 msgs → Claude mines
            │           → vault/pending/ + decisions/ + risks/ + ventures/
            │           → Asana push → Slack DM to Mariano
            └── MCP server (Docker, localhost:3000, each team machine)
                    └── Claude Code sessions (.claude/settings.json)
                            ├── list groups, read messages
                            ├── mine context on demand
                            └── send messages to groups
```

---

## Phase 1 — Deploy evolution-api on Railway

**Template:** https://railway.com/deploy/evolution-api-whatsapp-automation

Provisions automatically: evolution-api V2 + PostgreSQL + Redis + SSL + persistent volume.

### Railway env vars to set

| Variable | Value |
|----------|-------|
| `AUTHENTICATION_API_KEY` | Generate random (e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`) → save to `.env` as `EVOLUTION_API_KEY` |
| `WEBHOOK_GLOBAL_URL` | `https://both-transcript-miner.winter-shadow-facb.workers.dev/whatsapp` |
| `WEBHOOK_GLOBAL_ENABLED` | `true` |
| `WEBHOOK_EVENTS_MESSAGES_UPSERT` | `true` |
| `WEBHOOK_HEADER_KEY` | `X-Evolution-Secret` |
| `WEBHOOK_HEADER_VALUE` | Generate random → save to `.env` as `EVOLUTION_WEBHOOK_SECRET` |

### Connect dedicated SIM
1. Open `https://{railway-url}/manager`
2. Create instance (name: `both-main`)
3. Scan QR with the dedicated SIM's WhatsApp
4. Confirm status = `open`

### Add secrets to Cloudflare Worker

```bash
cd workers/transcript-miner
wrangler secret put EVOLUTION_API_URL      # https://evolution-api-xxx.railway.app
wrangler secret put EVOLUTION_API_KEY      # value from Railway AUTHENTICATION_API_KEY
wrangler secret put EVOLUTION_WEBHOOK_SECRET  # value from Railway WEBHOOK_HEADER_VALUE
```

### Deploy updated Worker

```bash
cd workers/transcript-miner
wrangler deploy
```

---

## Phase 2 — MCP Server (per machine)

The MCP server connects Claude Code sessions directly to evolution-api.  
Docker approach keeps the same config on every team machine.
